descriptionHtml:
D&D Kufner 54 Exclusive for Sale 2023 | 5 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

The D&D Kufner 54 Exclusive for sale 2023 is a modern 54-foot sailing yacht where elegance, comfort, and proven performance come together. This listing presents a vessel that has seen careful ownership and regular professional maintenance, with low engine hours and a host of premium features for private sailors or those seeking a top-level charter platform. She is immediately available, moored in Liguria, and the berth is paid until July 2026.

Main Specifications:

  • Model: Kufner 54 Exclusive
  • Year of construction: 2023
  • Hull length: 16.78 m
  • Beam: 4.95 m
  • Draft: 2.50 m
  • Displacement: 19.5 t
  • Flag: Italian
  • Current location: Liguria
  • Certification expiration: 2031

Engine & Performance:

  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH110 – 110 hp (shaft drive)
  • Engine hours: 400
  • Last Yanmar service: July 2025
  • Maximum speed: 10 knots
  • Cruising speed: 8.5 knots
  • Fuel capacity: 300 L (diesel, single tank)

Layout:

  • Cabins: 5 in total
    • 2 double aft cabins with en-suite bathroom
    • 1 forward double cabin
    • 2 cabins with bunk beds
  • Bathrooms: 3, all with electric toilets and black water tanks
  • Showers: 1 separate
  • USB ports: Present in all cabins

Fresh Water System:

  • Capacity: 900 litres (600 + 300 L tanks)
  • Boiler: Electric and engine powered
  • Autoclave: Present

Navigation & Electronics:

  • B&G GPS-Plotter
  • Autopilot
  • Radar
  • Log/Echo/Multidata
  • Wind station
  • VHF
  • AIS
  • SIMARINE system (battery & levels monitor)

Deck & Equipment:

  • Full teak deck: cockpit, coachroof, side decks
  • Furling mainsail & genoa
  • Electric winch (1)
  • Bow thruster
  • Windlass + mooring winch (110 m chain, galvanised)
  • Bimini & sprayhood
  • Gangway
  • Cockpit & sunbathing cushions

Comfort & Interior Equipment:

  • Air conditioning (2 units): aft cabins, forward/dinette area
  • Fully equipped galley with microwave
  • Column fridge with freezer
  • Wine fridge
  • Cockpit fridge

Safety:

  • Offshore liferaft: 12 people
  • Navigation category: Offshore unlimited

Financials & Notes:

  • Lease: Ongoing; takeover possible
  • Broker fees: Excluded
  • Trade-ins: Sail and motor considered
  • Immediate availability

The D&D Kufner 54 Exclusive for sale 2023 is a solid choice for owners who value a spacious, practical, and well-maintained offshore cruiser. Please contact us for further information or to arrange a visit.
